panels.title: Overview
panels.content:
Complete the Goddess Quest to restore the Harvest Goddess and win the game. The main steps are:

1. Obtain the full **Goddess Quilt** (4 steps)
2. Build all **5 Rainbow Bridges** — each requires 5 specific items
3. **Post-Quest**: find and plant 3 Seedlings of Hope
4. Accumulate **50 total villager hearts** to grow the Goddess Tree

Each rainbow also opens new areas of the island.

panels.title: 📜 Quilt (Prerequisite)

entry_Quest.name: Step 1 — Ship 1,000G of goods
entry_Quest.obtain: Any items: crops, fish, herbs, gems. Mayor visits after this.

entry_Quest.name: Step 2 — Ship another 1,000G (total 2,000G)
entry_Quest.obtain: Mayor gives left half of the quilt.

entry_Quest.name: Step 3 — Upgrade house to Level 2
entry_Quest.obtain: 3,000G + 16 wood + 16 stone. Talk to Gill, then Dale, then Mayor.

entry_Quest.name: Step 4 — Get key from Mayor; collect right half from Clock Tower
entry_Quest.obtain: Mayor gives key; use it on clock tower door in Town Square.

panels.infobox: Complete all 4 steps to enable the rainbows.

panels.title: 🟢 Rainbow 1 — Daren's (Green)

entry_Ingredient.name: Good Herb Fish
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Oven + fish + any herb. Fish sale value must total ≥300G for Good quality.

entry_Ingredient.name: Grilled Yam
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Yam + Match Set at beach bonfire. OR buy from Maya at Spring/Summer Market.

entry_Ingredient.name: Apple
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow apple tree (harvest Fall). OR buy from Simon at Spring/Summer Market.

entry_Ingredient.name: Common Seashell
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Find on any beach.

entry_Ingredient.name: Carp
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Catch in river (mid/downstream) or Maple Lake.

panels.infobox: Opens: West Gull Island + Toucan Island (ferry). Tree location: Town Square.

panels.title: 🔵 Rainbow 2 — Ben's (Blue)

entry_Ingredient.name: Grilled Eggplant
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Eggplant + Match Set at beach bonfire. Buy Eggplant seeds from Souffle Farm (Fall).

entry_Ingredient.name: Plain Omelet
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Frying Pan + butter + egg. OR buy from Simon at Spring/Summer Market.

entry_Ingredient.name: Green Herb
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Forage in Praline Forest. OR grow on farm (Spring). OR buy at Flower Festival.

entry_Ingredient.name: Char
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Catch in river, upstream.

entry_Ingredient.name: Good Tomato
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow on farm (Summer). OR buy at Harvest Festival (Fall).

panels.infobox: Opens: Mt. Gelato base (after Collin's). Tree location: Maple Lake. ⚠️ After completing, find Ben's badge on East Gull Island (cross Collin's rainbow first).

panels.title: 🟡 Rainbow 3 — Collin's (Yellow)

entry_Ingredient.name: Blue Wonderful
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Dig from crystals in either mine. ⚠️ Do NOT have Mira refine it!

entry_Ingredient.name: Perfect Spinach
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow on farm (Fall). Buy seeds from Souffle Farm.

entry_Ingredient.name: Saury
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Catch in Waffle Town Ocean.

entry_Ingredient.name: Red Wool Yarn
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Wool + yarn maker → dye with red herb/flower + dye pot. Buy Wool Yarn at Animal Festival!

entry_Ingredient.name: Banana
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Buy at Pineapple Inn (Toucan Island) or forage on Toucan Island.

panels.infobox: Opens: East Gull Island. Tree location: West Gull Island.

panels.title: 🔴 Rainbow 4 — Alan's (Red)

entry_Ingredient.name: Wood Fish
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Fish at Goddess Spring at NIGHT (6PM–4AM). Need Silver+ rod + Level 3+ rod. Give Mother Bear 14 honey to access spring (max 2/day).

entry_Ingredient.name: Green Bell Flower
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow on farm (Winter). Buy seeds from Pineapple Inn or Taylor's Seeds.

entry_Ingredient.name: Ostrich Mayonnaise
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Put ostrich egg in Mayo Maker. OR buy from Maya at Spring/Summer Market.

entry_Ingredient.name: Carrot Cake
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Oven + milk + egg + butter + carrot + breadfruit. OR buy from Elli at Fall/Winter Market.

entry_Ingredient.name: Toadstool
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Find in mines (spotted on ground). Floors 19 (Ganache) and 28 (Gelato) have many.

panels.infobox: Opens: Top of Mt. Gelato. Tree location: Brownie Ranch.

panels.title: 🟣 Rainbow 5 — Edge's (Purple)

entry_Ingredient.name: Snowflake Flower
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow on farm (Winter). Buy seeds from Souffle Farm. OR buy from Candace at Summer Market (Year 2+).

entry_Ingredient.name: Red Honey
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow red flowers (Tulip-Spring, Rose-Fall, Hibiscus-Summer, Anemone-Winter). Watch for bees.

entry_Ingredient.name: Tuna
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Catch in ocean with high-level rod.

entry_Ingredient.name: Perfect Honeydew
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow on farm (Summer). Buy seeds/fruit from Souffle Farm in Summer.

entry_Ingredient.name: Lapis Lazuli
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Dig in mines (1-sparkle Blue Wonderful). ⚠️ Have Mira REFINE it first!

panels.infobox: Opens: Goddess Tree. Tree location: Top of Mt. Gelato.

panels.title: 🌱 Post-Quest — Reviving the Goddess Tree
panels.infobox: After all 5 rainbows are complete, climb Mt. Gelato peak to trigger the next phase.

entry_Quest.name: Step 1 — Climb Mt. Gelato peak
entry_Quest.note: Pass out; objective becomes finding the Seedling of Hope.

entry_Quest.name: Step 2 — Talk to Jin at clinic
entry_Quest.note: Must be at his office, not home or walking.

entry_Quest.name: Step 4 — Plant seedling at Goddess Spring
entry_Quest.note: Take the seedling to the Goddess Spring area and plant it.

entry_Quest.name: Step 5 — Talk to Calvin → go to Ganache Mine Floor 10
entry_Quest.note: Calvin mentions a mural; meet him there for another seedling.

entry_Quest.name: Step 6 — Plant second seedling at Goddess Spring
Step 7 — Find Gill at Town Hall → talk to Mayor at Sundae Inn at night
Step 8 — Get key from church altar (when empty)
entry_Quest.note: Wait for no one in church; use key on Mayor's back garden door.

entry_Quest.name: Step 9 — Get third seedling from Mayor's garden → plant at Goddess Spring
entry_Quest.note: Return for one more scene to trigger tree growth.

entry_Quest.name: Step 10 — Accumulate 50 total hearts with all villagers
entry_Quest.note: Each villager/pet heart counts. Likely already done by now.

entry_Quest.name: Step 11 — Witness 4 night scenes of tree growing
entry_Quest.note: After 50 hearts, scenes play over several nights automatically. Edge sends a letter when done.

panels.title: ♾️ Journey Rucksack (New Game+)

entry_Ingredient.name: Rare Metal
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Dig Rare Ore from mine → have Mira refine it.

entry_Ingredient.name: Black Pearl
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Find on beaches.

entry_Ingredient.name: Shining Flax Yarn
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Grow Shining Flax on farm → Yarn Maker.

entry_Ingredient.name: Shining Wool Yarn
entry_Ingredient.obtain: Shining Wool from max-heart sheep → Yarn Maker.

panels.infobox: Complete the Rucksack to send your child to New Game+. Requires fully grown child + completed Goddess Quest.
